ValidationRule.description: Validation rule to mandate user to enter Closed Reason Details in case of other
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND($Setup.Rules_Execution__c.Run__c ,NOT($Permission.C_PERM_8020_Bypass_Opp_V_RULE) ,$Profile.Name <> 'DAS After Market Inside Sales User', NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name , 'System Administrator')), NOT(CONTAINS($User.Username, 'scrumteam-boston')), NOT(CONTAINS($User.Username, 'nicolle.mantia')), NOT(CONTAINS($User.Username, 'catherine.holland')),
RecordType.Name <> 'Informatics',
AND (ISBLANK(Reason_Lost_Detail__c), ISPICKVAL( Closed_Reason__c ,'Other')))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_047: Please fill "Closed Reason Detail" field.
